query:
SELECT
                id as "id!: Uuid",
                channel_id as "channel_id!: Uuid",
                content as "content!"
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    id, channel_id, content
                FROM
                    messages
                WHERE
                    channel_id = ?1 AND (?2 IS NULL OR id < ?2)
                ORDER BY
                    id DESC
                LIMIT
                    ?3
            )
            ORDER BY id ASC
